mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO inventory_risk (risk_no, sku_id, warehouse_id, risk_type, risk_level, available_stock, avg_daily_sales, support_days, status, scan_batch_no, latest_scan_time, risk_fingerprint, create_time, update_time) VALUES
(#{r.riskNo}, #{r.skuId}, #{r.warehouseId}, #{r.riskType}, #{r.riskLevel}, #{r.availableStock}, #{r.avgDailySales}, #{r.supportDays}, 'NEW', #{r.scanBatchNo}, NOW(), #{r.riskFingerprint}, NOW(), NOW())
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE risk_level = VALUES(risk_level), available_stock = VALUES(available_stock), avg_daily_sales = VALUES(avg_daily_sales), support_days = VALUES(support_days), scan_batch_no = VALUES(scan_batch_no), latest_scan_time = NOW(), status = CASE WHEN status = 'RESOLVED' THEN 'NEW' WHEN status = 'NEW' THEN 'NEW' ELSE status END
mapper.update: UPDATE inventory_risk SET status = 'RESOLVED', update_time = NOW() WHERE status = 'NEW' AND scan_batch_no IS NOT NULL AND scan_batch_no <> #{currentScanBatchNo}
